description_long: This object consists of three small, round cakes with chocolate ganache topping, each garnished with a pair of green leaves and a cluster of berries, possibly currants or cherries. The cakes are layered, with visible cream or mousse filling between the sponge layers, and are presented on two white, faceted plates. One plate holds two cakes, while the other holds a single cake accompanied by a black spoon. The cakes have a glossy, rich chocolate finish on top, contrasting with the matte, soft texture of the cake and cream layers. The decorative leaves and berries add a fresh, vibrant touch to the overall presentation. The plates are simple and elegant, enhancing the visual appeal of the cakes.
description: Three small, layered chocolate cakes with berry and leaf decorations are displayed on white plates, one with a black spoon. The cakes feature glossy chocolate tops and creamy layers.
description_view_0: Two cakes are on a larger plate, and one cake with a spoon is on a smaller plate in the foreground.
description_view_1: The single cake with a spoon is on the left, and the larger plate with one cake is on the right, showing the side profile of the cakes.
description_view_2: The two cakes on the larger plate are prominent in the foreground, with the single cake and spoon on a smaller plate in the background.
description_view_3: The larger plate with two cakes is on the left, and the single cake with a spoon is on the right, both viewed from a slight angle.
